en_title: Final Fantasy VII Remake Part 3 Called Revelation, Out Simultaneously Across All Platforms
cn_title: 《最终幻想7 重制版》第三部定名《启示录》，全平台同步发售
subtitle: 终章降临
opus_summary: 史克威尔艾尼克斯公布《最终幻想7 重制版》第三部《启示录》，2027年春季登陆任天堂Switch 2、PS5、Xbox Series及PC。本作拥有系列最广阔开放世界，文森特和希德成为可玩角色，引入FITS战斗系统。

paragraphs.en: Square Enix has finally revealed Final Fantasy VII Remake part three, called Revelation. It’s due out simultaneously across Nintendo Switch 2, PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X and S, and PC via Steam and Epic Games Store in spring 2027.
paragraphs.cn: 史克威尔艾尼克斯终于公布了《最终幻想7 重制版》第三部，定名《启示录》。该作将于2027年春季同步登陆任天堂Switch 2、PlayStation 5、Xbox Series X|S以及PC（Steam和Epic Games Store）。

paragraphs.en: Revelation concludes the Final Fantasy VII remake trilogy, following Final Fantasy VII remake’s release in 2020, and Rebirth’s release in 2024. Here's the official blurb from Square Enix:
paragraphs.cn: 《启示录》将为《最终幻想7 重制版》三部曲画上句号，前两部分别于2020年发售的《最终幻想7 重制版》和2024年发售的《重生》。以下是史克威尔艾尼克斯的官方介绍：

paragraphs.en: Square Enix announced Revelation at Summer Game Fest alongside a debut trailer showing the game's cast of now familiar characters in the nation of Wutai. We also learned that Vincent Valentine and Cid Highwind are playable characters alongside Cloud, Tifa, Barret, Red XIII, Yuffie, Cait Sith.
paragraphs.cn: 史克威尔艾尼克斯在夏日游戏节上公布了《启示录》，首支预告片展示了游戏角色在五台国的场景。我们还了解到，文森特·瓦伦丁和希德·海温德将成为可玩角色，与克劳德、蒂法、巴雷特、赤红十三、尤菲、凯特·西一同登场。

paragraphs.en: Square Enix has said that Final Fantasy VII Revelation will feature its most expansive open world yet which you'll able to explore aboard the Highwind, seamlessly skydiving from the airship to the world below. The entire planet serves as the stage for your adventure, Square Enix said. In addition to areas featured in previous entries, players can explore newly introduced regions, such as Mideel and Wutai.
paragraphs.cn: 史克威尔艾尼克斯表示，《最终幻想7 启示录》将拥有系列最广阔的开放世界，玩家可乘坐飞空艇「海温德」探索，并从飞空艇无缝跳伞至下方世界。整个星球都将成为冒险的舞台。除了前作已有的区域，玩家还能探索新地区，如米迪尔和五台国。

paragraphs.en: And as we see in the trailer, Weapons finally make an appearance. As Final Fantasy 7 fans will know, Weapons are monstrous guardians awakened by the planet itself to defend against Meteor. "Indiscriminate in their destruction, even the Weapons are enemies that Cloud and his companions must stand against," Square Enix said.
paragraphs.cn: 正如预告片所示，武器终于登场。《最终幻想7》粉丝都知道，武器是星球自身唤醒的巨型守护者，用以抵御陨石。史克威尔艾尼克斯表示：「武器不分敌我地毁灭一切，即便是它们，克劳德一行人也必须挺身对抗。」

paragraphs.en: The new combat system, called FITS, lets you change your characters’ combat style by equipping different outfits, each unlocking unique abilities and expanding your strategic options. Alongside FITS, you can customize your build with weapons and materia to prepare your team.
paragraphs.cn: 全新战斗系统FITS允许玩家通过装备不同服装来改变角色的战斗风格，每套服装解锁独特能力，拓展战略选择。配合FITS，你还可以通过武器和魔晶石自定义配置，为队伍做好准备。

paragraphs.en: For example, The Warrior Enhances offensive capabilities, enabling a wide range of aggressive playstyles. The Black Mage, however, specializes in offensive magic, enabling spell-focused combat. "Achieve new heights of power with this system by equipping unique outfits that bestow new movesets, evoking classic Final Fantasy jobs like Warrior and Black Mage," Square Enix said. "Enjoy each distinct look as you refine your build to suit your playstyle and develop your strategy."
paragraphs.cn: 例如，「战士」增强攻击能力，支持多种激进打法；而「黑魔法师」则专精攻击魔法，侧重法术战斗。史克威尔艾尼克斯表示：「通过装备赋予新动作集的独特服装，唤起经典《最终幻想》职业如战士和黑魔法师，借助该系统达到新的力量高度。在调整配置以适应自己玩法并制定策略时，享受每一种独特造型。」

paragraphs.en: Here's everything announced at Summer Game Fest 2026 if you need a catch up on what the video game industry has in store.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你想了解游戏行业的最新动态，这里是2026年夏日游戏节公布的全部内容。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。你可以在X上通过@wyp100找到他，或通过wesley_yinpoole@ign.com联系，也可通过wyp100@proton.me进行保密联系。

新战斗系统名称，无官方中文译名，保留英文
飞空艇名，沿用系列常见译名
FF7特有怪物名，沿用系列译名
